title: digitaria roxburghii
intro: Digitaria roxburghii, also known as Nagarmotha or Cogongrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Digitaria roxburghii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, infusions, and oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
